title: Next.js route blast radius benchmark seed
prompt: Review a deterministic content-loader change in a Next.js app-router fixture and verify that alias-resolved route flows, tests, configs, findings, and review readiness are surfaced without fake IDs or sensitive leakage.

blast_radius_reasons_include: graph relationship(s) touch the review blast radius

pass: A content-loader change maps to concrete Next.js route flows through alias-resolved evidence.
Review output preserves affected tests, configs, findings, and reviewer focus areas for route blast radius.
Review artifacts avoid fake placeholder flow IDs and sensitive token-like leakage.
fail: The task depends on installing Next.js, network access, or provider calls.
Alias-resolved route flows are missing from review blast radius.
Review output contains placeholder flow IDs or token-like sensitive strings.
